title: Revise release projection

tasks.title: Add release projection durability spec law
tasks.verification: RED: `pnpm test -- src/adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts` failed before spec requirement existed. GREEN: `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts` passed after adding rq-releaseProjectionDurability01 to advance-workflow spec/docs and citation in adv-archive command; post-format rerun passed (30 tests).

tasks.title: Enforce store-backed release proof before archive success
tasks.verification: RED: added archive regression where workflow release completion succeeds but store-backed `store.gates.get` still reports `release: pending`; `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts` failed with archive success true. GREEN: added `verifyReleaseGateDurableForArchive` using store-backed gates read plus Phase 9 evidence check before archive status save; blocked output cites rq-releaseProjectionDurability01. Focused test suite passed (11 tests) after implementation and formatting.

tasks.title: Support terminal retry and guarded projection recovery
tasks.verification: Recovery behavior implemented by the archive proof/recovery path from prior task: completed-workflow recovery uses saveRecoveredGateCompletion then store-backed durable proof, and no-worktree existing-bundle reconciliation verifies main-checkout Phase 9 evidence. Focused verification passed: `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts -t "reconciles release gate|repairs release projection|recovers release projection|blocks no-worktree"` (4 passed, 7 skipped).

tasks.title: Preserve archive side-effect ordering and idempotency
tasks.verification: Side-effect ordering implemented by archive proof path from task tk-41a8436cbe2f: durable release proof executes before status archive, and proof failure returns before store.changes.save, source/worktree cleanup, and linked issue closure. Focused verification passed: `pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts -t "blocks archive success|completes release gate after finalization|skips finalization"` (3 passed, 8 skipped).

tasks.title: Run final verification and strict ADV validation
tasks.verification: Final verification passed. Targeted changed tests: `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-autonomy-quality-assets.test.ts src/tools/change.archive-phase9.test.ts` passed (41 tests). User-authorized unrelated full-suite fixes verified with `pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-tron-assets.test.ts src/deploy-local.test.ts src/__tests__/spec-citation-invariant.test.ts` passed (72 tests). `pnpm run check` passed. `pnpm run build` passed. Full `pnpm test` passed. `adv_change_validate strict:true` passed with warning NO_DELTAS only.

proposal.approval_evidence: Proposal created as fast-follow to fixArchiveReleaseOrdering after user confirmed cleanup and requested use of existing archived change context. Problem statement confirmed: archive must not return success unless release gate projection is durably done, or must return blocked/recoverable error before retiring. Strict validation passed with expected pre-prep warnings NO_TASKS and NO_DELTAS.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed. Agreement approved inline by user reply `approve`. User decisions: prevent archive false-success with blocked/recoverable outcome when durable proof cannot be established; add advance-workflow spec requirement; require gate-status-equivalent read proof; keep seven gates while enforcing ordered internal archive substeps: archive sign-off -> Phase 9 finalize -> release-gate durable projection proof -> archive retirement/cleanup/issue closure. Contract minted with standard rigor. Validation after contract mint reports expected pre-prep coverage errors because tasks do not exist yet; prep will add task coverage.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed. Architecture keeps the seven-gate model and strengthens archive internals as ordered terminal substeps: archive sign-off -> Phase 9 finalization -> release-gate durable projection proof -> archive retirement/cleanup/issue closure. Independent validator verdict VALIDATED with implementation caution: durable proof helper must use the store-backed `store.gates.get(changeId)` path used by `adv_gate_status`, not another direct workflow poll, and must assert Phase 9 evidence in release approval_evidence.

planning.approval_evidence: Prep approved inline by user reply `approve`. Task graph has 5 tasks with contract refs and TDD intent: spec law, store-backed archive release proof, terminal retry/recovery, side-effect ordering/idempotency, final verification. Strict validation passed with only NO_DELTAS warning expected before spec task execution.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. All 5 tasks done. Built release projection durability spec law, store-backed archive release proof before archive success, completed-workflow/no-worktree recovery verification, side-effect ordering/idempotency verification, and final verification. Targeted changed tests passed, user-authorized unrelated full-suite failures fixed, `pnpm run check` passed, `pnpm run build` passed, full `pnpm test` passed, and `adv_change_validate strict:true` passed with NO_DELTAS warning only.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work inline by replying `accept`. Review verdict APPROVED, executive summary persisted, contract review matrix has 21 rows with 0 failed/violated/unknown, all tasks done and verification passed.

items.text: `adv_change_archive phase9:"run"` cannot return `success: true` while a post-return `adv_gate_status`-equivalent read would show `release: pending`.
Archive success requires durable `gates.release.status === "done"` with Phase 9 evidence, or returns a blocked/recoverable result before claiming success.
Existing-bundle/completed-workflow/cleaned-worktree retry reconciles stale release metadata without manual worktree recreation.
Missing merge/reachability/push evidence still blocks release completion.
Healthy archive remains idempotent: no double merge, double push, double issue close, or unsafe cleanup.
`advance-workflow` gains a spec requirement for release projection durability.
Regression tests cover success-with-release-pending and post-archive gate-status-equivalent reads.
Targeted tests, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, full `pnpm test`, and strict ADV validation pass.

Archive keeps seven gates; release/finalize/archive are ordered internal archive substeps: archive sign-off -> Phase 9 finalize -> release-gate durable projection proof -> archive retirement/cleanup/issue closure.
Must not mark `release` complete without structural Phase 9 evidence.
Must not return archive success with known stale release-gate projection.
Must not rely on manual worktree rematerialization for normal recovery.
Must not weaken linked-issue closure, worktree cleanup, or default-branch push safeguards.
Must not reintroduce `defineUpdate` on change workflows.
Must not add an eighth gate or require a separate manual release command for this fix.
Must keep correctness structural: tests, typed state/projection checks, and deterministic blocked/recovery paths own correctness; heuristic or chat conventions do not.
Replacing the archive workflow.
Changing release evidence requirements beyond requiring durable proof before success.
Changing non-release gate sequencing.
Changing task-completion semantics.
Manual ADV state-file edits or Temporal DB surgery.

acceptanceCriteria: `adv_change_archive phase9:"run"` cannot return `success: true` while a post-return `adv_gate_status`-equivalent read would show `release: pending`.
Archive success requires durable `gates.release.status === "done"` with Phase 9 evidence, or returns a blocked/recoverable result before claiming success.
Existing-bundle/completed-workflow/cleaned-worktree retry reconciles stale release metadata without manual worktree recreation.
Missing merge/reachability/push evidence still blocks release completion.
Healthy archive remains idempotent: no double merge, double push, double issue close, or unsafe cleanup.
`advance-workflow` gains a spec requirement for release projection durability.
Regression tests cover success-with-release-pending and post-archive gate-status-equivalent reads.
Targeted tests, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, full `pnpm test`, and strict ADV validation pass.

Archive keeps seven gates; release/finalize/archive are ordered internal archive substeps: archive sign-off -> Phase 9 finalize -> release-gate durable projection proof -> archive retirement/cleanup/issue closure.
